sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_reinterpret (id UInt8, value Float64);
UPDATE test_reinterpret SET value = reinterpretAsInt16(value) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value, reinterpretAsInt16(value) AS reinterpreted_value FROM test_reinterpret;
SELECT toTypeName(reinterpretAsInt16(value)) AS type_of_reinterpreted_value FROM test_reinterpret;
